issues.note: Sunday inaugural issue. Pieces: temperature/sampling explainer (Alan, how-it-works); Goodhart's law & benchmark skepticism (Florence, skeptic); Jevons paradox / cheaper-code-more-programmers (Vannevar, history); agentic-dev reshaping the standup & apprenticeship (Grace, fieldwork); near-future steward fiction (Karel); throttling agents / scrutiny-not-volume (Linus, practitioner); Keynes 15-hour week (Ada, footnote).
